message:
🌱 distribution: API different responses (#793)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "distribution-2452-api-different-responses",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "distribution: API different responses",
+    "description": "API different responses. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current distribution deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your distribution version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nhelm list -n distribution 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working distribution installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review distribution configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant distribution configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nkubectl get configmap -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=distribution\n```\nHi! \nWe have a problem with registry (ver. 2.6.1)\n\nRegistry API returns manifests and tags (for endpoint - /tags/list). Sometimes we get different responses."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for API different responses",
+        "description": "Adding pagination to the registry, which is required to live up to the OCI Distribution Specification.\nThis will also fix a bug with tags being returned in random orders.\n\nNow supports pagination if the user requests it, otherwise return all tags.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nkubectl get events -n distribution --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"API different responses\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Adding pagination to the registry, which is required to live up to the OCI Distribution Specification.\nThis will also fix a bug with tags being returned in random orders.\n\nNow supports pagination if the user requests it, otherwise return all tags.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "distribution",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "distribution"
+    ],

+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/distribution/distribution/issues/2452",

+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 13,

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl",
+      "docker",
+      "curl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with distribution installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
